positive: A stylized illustration of a majestic fox emerging from a tangled wreath of bioluminescent forest flora and deep indigo vines. The fox should have sharp, clean silhouette lines, golden-orange fur tones contrasting against cool emerald green, sapphire blue, and violet accents. The composition must be centered, with the fox in a powerful, alert pose, looking directly forward. High contrast, graphic novel style mixed with ethereal magical realism. Studio lighting emphasizing clean edges and bold color blocks. Suitable for screen printing on apparel. Vector art aesthetic, clean edges, perfect symmetry, minimalist background elements.
negative: photorealistic, blur, low quality, artifact, text, watermark, logo, signature, copyright, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noisy, dirty, grainy, out of frame, messy, smudges
